bonusTasks.claudePrompt: I am a PM and I am looking at a retention cohort table for my app. Week 0 retention is 100% for all cohorts. Week 1 retention is 45%. Week 2 is 28%. Week 4 is 18%. Week 8 is 12%. Week 12 is 11% and seems to have flattened. Help me interpret this data: what is the retention curve telling me, what is my power user base, where is the biggest drop-off, and what 3 experiments would you run first?
